steps: Settings → Your account → Account information: change your username (@handle) and display name to your current name.
Edit your bio and any pinned posts that reference your former name.
Delete or archive old posts that show your former name (a bulk-delete tool you run yourself can help).
Deactivate abandoned old accounts that still carry your former name.
deadnameRemoval.limits: Changing your @handle frees the old one for someone else to take, and old links or screenshots may still show it.
deadnameRemoval.escalation: Report targeted misgendering or harassment under X's policies; outcomes vary.

steps: Settings → Privacy and safety: protect your posts if you want them visible only to approved followers.
Turn off “let others find you by your email or phone number”.
Review connected apps and remove ones you don't use.
